name: theme-generator
description: Generate deterministic Monet-style themes for websites and editors from a source image.

scripts.format: bun ./node_modules/prettier/bin/prettier.cjs src test README.md package.json tsconfig.json eslint.config.mjs .github/workflows/ci.yml .prettierrc --write
scripts.format:check: bun ./node_modules/prettier/bin/prettier.cjs src test README.md package.json tsconfig.json eslint.config.mjs .github/workflows/ci.yml .prettierrc --check
